studies.title: Randomized controlled clinical trial of the efficacy of the digital self-help program edupression.com® in mild-to-moderate unipolar depressive patients

The clinical area aligns with the described ICD-10 codes for unipolar depression, and the intervention appears to be specific to this DTx. While the abstract and intervention details are not available, the explicit mention of the product name in the title strongly supports relevance.
